subcodes.first_line: O Faithful God! These beloved and pure ones are the hosts of life and the legions of salvation, spiritual armies and waves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدای باوفا این احباء و اصفیا سپاه حیاتند و جنود نجات افواج روحانیند و امواج
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
